expectations.text: Emits a machine-readable structured plan (JSON with a moves array)
Structured plan passes validate_plan.py (>=15 moves, acyclic, win-conditions covered)
Names an explicit win condition / Definition of Done
Lays out 15 or more ordered moves
Marks at least one branch point / contingency
Surfaces >=3 commonly-dropped work items (auth, migration, rate-limit, audit, observability, rollback, session expiry, tests)
